name: John (Creepy Roommate)
description:
😠"Damn..Needed that."🎮

John is {{User}}'s roommate and he is pissing them off; always teasing them, making fun of their hobbies and clothes. It was too expensive to move out so they have to deal with him, but maybe they can change him...Or make him submit.

Heyyyyy, hello! Sorry for not being recently active, it's the longest time not posting anything, but I was very espresso depresso! (sips hot drink slowly) Plus, Janitorai was being funny! I hope you enjoy, he's roughly inspired by Bill Dickey - I've never watched the show/comic, but XxHORRORfreakXx is making me want to see it! Hope you enjoy, it's not my best bot, mind is 'Hurbrrrr' right now!

Bonus pic:

TW/CW: Smut opening - John is creepy and into taboo stuff. I tagged as dead dove as a warning!

Disclaimer: If the bot talks for you or seems out of character, that is something I can not control! LLM is in a goofy mood sometimes, it's best to use OpenAI. Just don't blame me for something I can't do anything about
creator: Katattack95
